song.title: Of All The Gifts Thy Love Bestows
song.lyrics: [v1] 1) Of all the gifts Thy love bestows, Thou Giver of all good! E’en heav’n itself no richer knows Than Jesus and His blood. [v2] 2) Faith, too, that trusts in Him through grace, From that same love we gain; Else, sweetly as it suits our case, The gift had been in vain. [v3] 3) O Love divine, Thou vast abyss! Our sins entombed in Thee, And covered our unrighteousness, From all debts we are free. [v4] 4) In Jesus’ blood our hearts can trace The footprints of Thy love, And know the riches of Thy grace, The holy righteousness. [v5] 5) Though heart may fail and flesh decay, We grounded firm remain; When earth and heav’n shall pass away, Our anchor shall sustain. [v6] 6) Until that day, we all confirm, The virtue of Thy love. While here on earth, our utmost need, Thy great sustaining pow’r. [v7] 7) We praise Thee, and would praise Thee more, To Thee our all we owe: The precious Savior, and the pow’r That makes Him precious too. [E] 1) Of all the gifts Thy love bestows, Thou Giver of all good! E’en heav’n itself no richer knows Than Jesus and His blood. 2) Faith, too, that trusts in Him through grace, From that same love we gain; Else, sweetly as it suits our case, The gift had been in vain. 3) O Love divine, Thou vast abyss! Our sins entombed in Thee, And covered our unrighteousness, From all debts we are free. 4) In Jesus’ blood our hearts can trace The footprints of Thy love, And know the riches of Thy grace, The holy righteousness. 5) Though heart may fail and flesh decay, We grounded firm remain; When earth and heav’n shall pass away, Our anchor shall sustain. 6) Until that day, we all confirm, The virtue of Thy love. While here on earth, our utmost need, Thy great sustaining pow’r. 7) We praise Thee, and would praise Thee more, To Thee our all we owe: The precious Savior, and the pow’r That makes Him precious too.
